meta.title: Atlas Batiment Modulaire | Containers & Modular Solutions
meta.description: Local mastery, guaranteed excellence. Modular construction solutions, prefabricated containers and steel structures. Fast delivery.

hero.subtitle: Easy solutions in difficult conditions. High capacity production infrastructure, material quality and technical possibilities on your sites.

prefab.title: Prefabricated
prefab.desc: Time-saving and economical building solutions produced in facility and shipped unassembled to construction sites for quick installation.
features: Turnkey service from concrete to finishing

container.title: Living Container
container.desc: Ready-to-use modular container buildings ideal for short-term occupancy in construction sites and temporary camps.
features: Ideal living space for short-term use

lightsteel.title: Light Gauge Steel
lightsteel.desc: Cold-formed, galvanized steel construction system emphasizing speed, sustainability and flexibility with reduced building weight.
features: Long lasting, permanent and aesthetic building system

structural.title: Structural Steel
structural.desc: Large-span steel structures completed primarily at production facility for precision assembly without site mismatches.
features: High construction speed and cost efficiency

solutions.title: Our Sectors
solutions.subtitle: Modular solutions tailored to every industry sector

prefab.title: Prefabricated Container
prefab.desc: Modular prefabricated containers for fast and durable construction. Fast delivery guaranteed.

mining.title: Mining Camps
mining.desc: Modular camps for mining sites, rapidly deployable on any terrain.

construction.title: Construction Camps
construction.desc: Modular installations for construction sites and large-scale projects.

defense.title: Defense Industry
defense.desc: Specialized structures for defense sector requirements.

energy.title: Energy Projects
energy.desc: Modular installations for the energy industry and infrastructure projects.

worksite.title: Worksite and Camp Buildings
worksite.desc: Buildings used for mobilization of all kinds of construction sites.

multipurpose.title: Multi-Purpose Buildings
multipurpose.desc: Used by public institutions, municipalities and investors for various purposes.

about.title: Corporate
about.subtitle: Local Mastery, Guaranteed Excellence
about.intro: Atlas Batiment Modulaire offers high-quality modular solutions with high capacity production infrastructure. We design, manufacture and install prefabricated containers for industrial, mining, energy and civil sectors.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Our completed projects around the world

capacity.title: Production Capacity
capacity.facility: Modern production facility with fully automatic production lines

footer.description: High-quality modular construction and prefabricated container solutions. Fast delivery guaranteed.
